information: Exploring the use of diffusion models for counterfactual augmentation to mitigate spurious correlations in image datasets.

Investigated and implemented culturally-aligned LLM post-training approaches by creating specialized datasets and leveraging Multiple LoRA Experts, resulting in the model Matina and a published paper at ACL 2025.
Developed and instructed programming courses, including creating tutorials, designing unit-tested problems, and providing debugging support to students.
